messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: The swarm's tmux socket lives in /tmp, where anything can silently and irrecoverably decapitate it
What it solves: WHAT HAPPENED. The swarm launched at 01:19 on `/tmp/swarmforge-1000/1523266553.sock`. Before 02:06
the entire `/tmp/swarmforge-1000/` directory was deleted out from under the running tmux server.
Observed: the tmux server (pid 6634) still ALIVE, still owning all 8 role panes; all 8 role `claude`
pr…
How it works: The control socket does not live in shared scratch space
